query:
-- Insert Smile IT as a customer (next ID after C9002)
INSERT INTO customers (
  externalId, name, businessName, status,
  siteAddress, ownershipType, notes,
  serviceCount, monthlyCost, unmatchedCount, matchedCount, unmatchedBillingCount,
  createdAt, updatedAt
) VALUES (
  'C9003',
  'Smile IT',
  'Smile IT Pty Ltd',
  'active',
  '60 Enterprise Place, Tingalpa QLD 4173',
  'business',
  'Internal SmileTel / Smile IT head office. Omada controller site: SIT-NFR organisation, site ID 68c7968b02f4f0550e351591.',
  0, 0.00, 0, 0, 0,
  NOW(), NOW()
);

-- Insert the Omada site record linked to C9003
INSERT INTO omada_sites (
  omadaSiteId, omadaSiteName, customerExternalId,
  matchType, matchConfidence,
  siteRegion, siteScenario,
  wanIp, wanStatus,
  deviceCount, apCount, switchCount, gatewayCount, clientCount,
  healthScore, healthStatus, alertCount,
  rawJson, lastSyncedAt, createdAt, updatedAt
) VALUES (
  '68c7968b02f4f0550e351591',
  'Smile IT Head Office',
  'C9003',
  'manual',
  100.00,
  'Australia',
  'Office',
  '1.146.10.174',
  'active',
  3, 1, 1, 1, 0,
  100, 'good', 0,
  '{"address":"60 Enterprise Place, Tingalpa Queensland 4173, Australia","latitude":-27.474438,"longitude":153.112836,"name":"Smile IT Head Office","region":"Australia","scenario":"Office","siteId":"68c7968b02f4f0550e351591","sitePublicIp":"1.146.10.174","supportES":false,"supportL2":true,"timeZone":"Australia/Brisbane","type":0}',
  NOW(), NOW(), NOW()
);
